root_text.an4.84:1.1: “Catūhi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ niraye.
root_text.an4.84:1.3: Kodhagaru hoti na saddhammagaru, makkhagaru hoti na saddhammagaru, lābhagaru hoti na saddhammagaru, sakkāragaru hoti na saddhammagaru—
root_text.an4.84:1.4: imehi kho, bhikkhave, catūhi dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ niraye.
root_text.an4.84:2.1: Catūhi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ sagge.
root_text.an4.84:2.3: Saddhammagaru hoti na kodhagaru, saddhammagaru hoti na makkhagaru, saddhammagaru hoti na lābhagaru, saddhammagaru hoti na sakkāragaru—
root_text.an4.84:2.4: imehi kho, bhikkhave, catūhi dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ sagge”ti.

translation_text.an4.84:1.1: “Mendicants, someone with four qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there.
translation_text.an4.84:1.3: They value anger, or denigration, or material things, or honor rather than the true teaching.
translation_text.an4.84:1.4: Someone with these four qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there.
translation_text.an4.84:2.1: Someone with four qualities is placed in heaven as if delivered there.
translation_text.an4.84:2.3: They value the true teaching rather than anger, or denigration, or material things, or honor.
translation_text.an4.84:2.4: Someone with these four qualities is placed in heaven as if delivered there.”
